dialogues.text: Yo, I'm short on bus fare. Just $2, come on.
I got something going on. Deliver this envelope across town — $12 in it for you.
dialogues.no_response: Your loss. I'll find someone else.

dialogues.text: My stomach's empty, man. $4 for food?
dialogues.yes_response: Good looking out. I won't forget.

dialogues.text: Keep watch near that corner for 10 minutes. $9 when you're done.
dialogues.yes_response: Cool. Just stand there, act natural.

dialogues.text: Need $6 or my guys are gonna be real unhappy with me tonight.
dialogues.yes_response: You just saved me a lot of pain. Thanks.
dialogues.no_response: Fine. Not your problem I guess.

dialogues.text: Tell that guy in the red hat I said hey. Just walk past him and say it. $5.
dialogues.yes_response: Simple. Go now before he moves.

dialogues.text: I'm just $3 short of getting myself straight tonight.
Pick something up from the bench near the fountain. Don't look in the bag. $10.
Help me out with $8. I'll owe you one, and my favors are worth something.
dialogues.no_response: Your call. Hope you never need a favor.

dialogues.text: Distract that security guy for two minutes. I'll give you $11.
dialogues.yes_response: Just ask him for directions or something. Go.
